title: lfnovo/open-notebook
summary: A privacy-first, open-source alternative to Google's Notebook LM with support for 18+ AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, DeepSeek, Groq, etc.), multi-speaker podcast generation (1-4 speakers with custom profiles), full-text and vector search, content transformations, and a comprehensive REST API. Supports PDF, video, audio, web pages. Built with Python, Next.js, SurrealDB. 29.6k stars, MIT license, 739 commits.
chinese_summary: Google Notebook LM 的隐私优先开源替代方案，支持 18+ AI 提供商（OpenAI、Anthropic、Ollama、DeepSeek、Groq 等），1-4 人多声部播客生成、全文与向量搜索、内容转换和完整的 REST API。支持 PDF、视频、音频、网页等多种格式。Python + Next.js + SurrealDB 技术栈，2.96 万星，MIT 协议，739 次提交。
